key_files: plugins/base/commands/feature.md:66-77 — BACKLOG_PROMOTE prose spec (scaffold, slug, pending_finding_removal, fall-through)
plugins/base/commands/feature.md:209-218 — promoted_slug preservation in Step 3 bash block
plugins/base/commands/bug.md:41-53 — Step 1 IF/ELSE block; new backlog: branch inserts after line 45
plugins/base/commands/bug.md:265-299 — Step 4 wrap-up; deferred bullet removal inserts after line 265
plugins/base/skills/orient/SKILL.md:143-149 — Rule 8 findings-ready-to-promote block; /base:next cross-ref appends here
patterns: Deferred-then-atomic bullet removal: finding stays in Findings until durable replacement record (epic-state.json / result.json+ACCEPTED) is written; then removed in a single read-modify-write
pending_finding_removal captured as in-session variable at argument-parse time, consumed at durable-record-write site, never persisted to disk
Slug preserved via promoted_slug in-session variable to prevent re-derivation from user-edited title
BACKLOG_PROMOTE is a fall-through mode: scaffolds then delegates to normal execution path
Orphan detectability: abandoned scaffold intentionally left for /base:orient Rule 2 drift detection
focuses.canonical_finding_bullet:
- [<type>] <anchor> — <text> (YYYY-MM-DD)
where type ∈ { bug | chore | question | observation }, anchor is path[:line] or -, text is one-line present-tense

bug_md_insertion_points.backlog_promote_branch: after line 45 (before existing ELSE at line 46) in Step 1 IF/ELSE
bug_md_insertion_points.deferred_removal: after line 265 (state file update in Step 4), before parallel synthesizer/curator spawn at line 267

focuses.orient_insertion_point: append to end of Rule 8 block at orient/SKILL.md:143-149

key_files: plugins/base/.claude-plugin/plugin.json — plugin identity; no per-command listing
.claude-plugin/marketplace.json — plugin-level advertising only; no commands array
focuses.discovery_mechanism: File presence in plugins/base/commands/ — no explicit registration in plugin.json or marketplace.json
focuses.model_convention: opus for precision/diagnosis workflows (bug, rebase); sonnet for orchestration/dispatch workflows (feature, implement-full)
focuses.manifest_registration: none required — AC-MANIFEST-1 is satisfied by file presence alone
focuses.marketplace_update: optional editorial only — no structural requirement
focuses.naming_convention: kebab-case slug matching filename: next.md → name: next

key_files: package.json — only script is release; no test/lint/validate targets
CLAUDE.md — sole rule: NEVER bump versions manually
plugins/base/schemas/result.schema.json — JSON schema for runtime artifacts only, not .md frontmatter
scripts/release.mjs — version bump script; reads plugin.json; does not validate .md content
focuses.automated_validation: none — no CI, no markdownlint, no yamllint, no .github/ directory
focuses.version_bump_process: NEVER manually — scripts/release.mjs via npm run release is the only sanctioned path
focuses.typical_commit_shape: feat(base): <description> — command .md + any supporting agent .md files together; version bump is a separate Release commit via release script
focuses.file_placement: commands → plugins/base/commands/<slug>.md (flat); skills → plugins/base/skills/<slug>/SKILL.md (directory); agents → plugins/base/agents/<slug>.md (flat)
gotchas: Skills are directories (not flat files); commands and agents are flat .md files
allowed-tools is required in command frontmatter; standard set includes Task, Read, Write, Edit, Bash, AskUserQuestion, Skill
Version bumps always go in a separate release commit — never co-committed with feature changes
